titleStmt.title: SII 33.109: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 109. (A.R. No. 31 of 1948.) Yāḍaki, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Two slabs built into the wall to the proper right of entrance of the Āḷvār shrine in the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Kārttika śu. 12 (Tirkōṭi-Dvādasi) corresponding to 1562 A.D. November 7, Saturday °96.
Damaged. Records the gift of lands to the temple of Śri Kēśavamūrtti at Yāḍaki in Gutti-sīma by Tirumala-Nāyaka.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1484 Agunēṭi duṁdhubhi saṁvatsara
kārtika śuddha tirkōṭidvādasi puṇyakālamaṁdu śrīmadrājādhirājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsiva
dēvamahārājulu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhūḍayi prathvīsāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu Akhilāṁḍa
kōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyakuḍaina śrīman kēśavamūrtti divya pādapadmalaku tirumala mādavayyagāru
nayabhayabhaktiniṁnni daṁḍaṁ Anaṁtamulu samarpiṁcci Āḷuvārulaku gaḍiṁcina
vāṭi Āḷegeku jagatāpi guttisīmalōni Aṁtaśanāyanigāri rāyaṁ śānaku
dēvamahārājugāru yāḍaki grāmaṁ tiṁmā nāyanigāru guttisīma
ku cellivacce yāḍaki tūrpuna guḍicēnu puṭṭuḍu cēnulōnu paḍumaṭi paṁḍlu
yaracēnu Āruḍuya cenu Āḷuvārlataḷigeku
vācāraṁgānu yu ḍici
samarpiṁcina bhūrdāna dharmmaśāsanaṁ dānapālanarmadyēdānāyēnu
pālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ vāyōharēti
vasuṁddharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiyerābhū
Digital edition of SII 33.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
